description: Technical Specifications section is a placeholder; project-specific engineering content not uploaded.
evidence: Section s_ts has source = Placeholder and isPlaceholder = true.
suggestedFix: Upload approved Technical Specifications, drawings or BOQ; or select an approved historical template; assign to Technical Officer for approval.
impactIfIgnored: Tender cannot be published; bid process risk; engineering disputes during execution.

description: Design Criteria section is a placeholder; design wave height, berthing energy, seismic factor not specified.
evidence: Section s_dc has missingVariables: Design wave height, Berthing energy, Seismic zone factor.
suggestedFix: Upload department-approved Design Criteria document; route to Technical Officer Approval queue.
impactIfIgnored: Bidder design assumptions will diverge; cost & safety risk.

description: Available Bid Capacity formula present; definitions of A, N and B not explicit alongside formula.
evidence: Section s_qr contains formula but missing definition paragraph.
suggestedFix: Insert standard definition paragraph from Rulebook (auto-fixable).
impactIfIgnored: Bidders may interpret formula differently; eligibility disputes.

description: SCC contains placeholder 'CRZ clearance reference number'.
evidence: Section s_scc missingVariables includes CRZ clearance reference number.
suggestedFix: Officer to enter CRZ clearance number; otherwise mark 'to be obtained by Employer prior to mobilisation' (already drafted).
impactIfIgnored: Ambiguity in SCC; possible contract dispute.

description: ITT clause 5 mentions hard-copy backup submission. Portal SOP requires online-only.
suggestedFix: Replace clause to read 'online via APeProcurement portal only' (auto-fixable).
impactIfIgnored: Confusion to bidders; procedural objection risk.

description: JV clause does not explicitly state joint and several liability through defect liability period.
evidence: ITT §4.4 missing 'joint and several liability through defect liability period' phrase.
suggestedFix: Insert standard JV liability sentence from Rulebook (auto-fixable).
